mapper.select:
SELECT DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(ss.created_time / 1000)) AS dateStr, ss.site_code AS siteCode, ss.site_name AS siteName, ss.company_name AS companyName, ss.site_type AS siteType, ss.currency_code AS currencyCode, SUM(ss.new_members) AS newMembers, SUM(ss.first_deposit_count) AS firstDepositCount, SUM(ss.first_deposit_amount) AS firstDepositAmount, SUM(ss.deposit_amount) AS depositAmount, SUM(ss.deposit_count) AS depositCount, SUM(ss.withdrawal_amount) AS withdrawalAmount, SUM(ss.withdrawal_count) AS withdrawalCount, SUM(ss.large_withdrawal_count) AS largeWithdrawalCount, SUM(ss.deposit_withdrawal_difference) AS depositWithdrawalDifference, SUM(ss.site_vip_benefits) AS siteVipBenefits, SUM(ss.site_promotional_offers) AS sitePromotionalOffers, SUM(ss.site_used_offers) AS siteUsedOffers, SUM(ss.site_other_adjustments) AS siteOtherAdjustments, SUM(ss.bet_count) AS betCount, SUM(ss.betting_amount) AS bettingAmount, SUM(ss.valid_betting) AS validBetting, SUM(ss.member_profit_loss) AS memberProfitLoss, SUM(ss.net_profit) AS netProfit, SUM(ss.plat_adjust_amount) AS platAdjustAmount, SUM(ss.tips_amount) AS tipsAmount, SUM(ss.risk_amount) AS riskAmount FROM report_site_statistics ss WHERE ss.created_time BETWEEN #{vo.startTime} AND #{vo.endTime}
AND ss.site_code = #{vo.siteCode}
AND ss.site_name = #{vo.siteName}
AND ss.site_type = #{vo.siteType}
AND ss.currency_code = #{vo.currencyCode}
GROUP BY DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(ss.created_time / 1000)), ss.site_code, ss.site_name, ss.company_name, ss.site_type, ss.currency_code
HAVING (#{vo.memberWinLossMin} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.member_profit_loss) >= #{vo.memberWinLossMin}) AND (#{vo.memberWinLossMax} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.member_profit_loss) <= #{vo.memberWinLossMax}) AND (#{vo.orderCountMin} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.bet_count) >= #{vo.orderCountMin}) AND (#{vo.orderCountMax} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.bet_count) <= #{vo.orderCountMax}) AND (#{vo.betAmountMin} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.betting_amount) >= #{vo.betAmountMin}) AND (#{vo.betAmountMax} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.betting_amount) <= #{vo.betAmountMax}) AND (#{vo.validBetMin} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.valid_betting) >= #{vo.validBetMin}) AND (#{vo.validBetMax} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.valid_betting) <= #{vo.validBetMax}) AND (#{vo.depositAmountMin} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.deposit_amount) >= #{vo.depositAmountMin}) AND (#{vo.depositAmountMax} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.deposit_amount) <= #{vo.depositAmountMax}) AND (#{vo.withdrawalAmountMin} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.withdrawal_amount) >= #{vo.withdrawalAmountMin}) AND (#{vo.withdrawalAmountMax} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.withdrawal_amount) <= #{vo.withdrawalAmountMax})
ORDER BY firstDepositAmount asc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY firstDepositAmount desc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY depositAmount asc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY depositAmount desc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY withdrawalAmount asc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY withdrawalAmount desc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY validBetting asc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY validBetting desc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY memberProfitLoss asc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY memberProfitLoss desc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY netProfit asc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY netProfit desc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY tipsAmount asc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY tipsAmount desc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY dateStr desc,siteCode,currencyCode

SELECT DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(ss.created_time / 1000)) AS dateStr, ss.site_code AS siteCode, ss.site_name AS siteName, ss.company_name AS companyName, ss.site_type AS siteType, ss.currency_code AS currencyCode, SUM(ss.new_members) AS newMembers, SUM(ss.first_deposit_count) AS firstDepositCount, SUM(ss.first_deposit_amount) AS firstDepositAmount, SUM(ss.deposit_amount) AS depositAmount, SUM(ss.deposit_count) AS depositCount, SUM(ss.withdrawal_amount) AS withdrawalAmount, SUM(ss.withdrawal_count) AS withdrawalCount, SUM(ss.large_withdrawal_count) AS largeWithdrawalCount, SUM(ss.deposit_withdrawal_difference) AS depositWithdrawalDifference, SUM(ss.site_vip_benefits) AS siteVipBenefits, SUM(ss.site_promotional_offers) AS sitePromotionalOffers, SUM(ss.site_used_offers) AS siteUsedOffers, SUM(ss.site_other_adjustments) AS siteOtherAdjustments, SUM(ss.bet_count) AS betCount, SUM(ss.betting_amount) AS bettingAmount, SUM(ss.valid_betting) AS validBetting, SUM(ss.member_profit_loss) AS memberProfitLoss, SUM(ss.net_profit) AS netProfit, SUM(ss.plat_adjust_amount) AS platAdjustAmount, SUM(ss.tips_amount) AS tipsAmount, SUM(ss.risk_amount) AS riskAmount FROM report_site_statistics ss WHERE ss.created_time BETWEEN #{vo.startTime} AND #{vo.endTime}
AND ss.site_code = #{vo.siteCode}
AND ss.site_name = #{vo.siteName}
AND ss.site_type = #{vo.siteType}
AND ss.currency_code = #{vo.currencyCode}
GROUP BY DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(ss.created_time / 1000)), ss.site_code, ss.site_name, ss.company_name, ss.site_type, ss.currency_code
HAVING (#{vo.memberWinLossMin} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.member_profit_loss) >= #{vo.memberWinLossMin}) AND (#{vo.memberWinLossMax} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.member_profit_loss) <= #{vo.memberWinLossMax}) AND (#{vo.orderCountMin} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.bet_count) >= #{vo.orderCountMin}) AND (#{vo.orderCountMax} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.bet_count) <= #{vo.orderCountMax}) AND (#{vo.betAmountMin} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.betting_amount) >= #{vo.betAmountMin}) AND (#{vo.betAmountMax} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.betting_amount) <= #{vo.betAmountMax}) AND (#{vo.validBetMin} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.valid_betting) >= #{vo.validBetMin}) AND (#{vo.validBetMax} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.valid_betting) <= #{vo.validBetMax}) AND (#{vo.depositAmountMin} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.deposit_amount) >= #{vo.depositAmountMin}) AND (#{vo.depositAmountMax} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.deposit_amount) <= #{vo.depositAmountMax}) AND (#{vo.withdrawalAmountMin} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.withdrawal_amount) >= #{vo.withdrawalAmountMin}) AND (#{vo.withdrawalAmountMax} IS NULL OR SUM(ss.withdrawal_amount) <= #{vo.withdrawalAmountMax})
ORDER BY firstDepositAmount asc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY firstDepositAmount desc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY depositAmount asc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY depositAmount desc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY withdrawalAmount asc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY withdrawalAmount desc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY validBetting asc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY validBetting desc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY memberProfitLoss asc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY memberProfitLoss desc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY netProfit asc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY netProfit desc, dateStr,siteCode,currencyCode
ORDER BY dateStr desc,siteCode,currencyCode
